title: Elaine Low receives 22% shareholding in Bayan Resources (BYAN) from Low Tuck Kwong
body: Conglomerate and controller of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), Low Tuck Kwong, gave his daughter Elaine Low control over 7.33 billion BYAN shares on Wednesday, August 28. Elaine now owns 22% of the shares in the coal mining and contractor company, while Low Tuck Kwong's share portion decreased from 62.15% to just 40.15%. Securities firm BUT Butsche Bank AG facilitated the transaction between the two.

title: Two bonds from Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper (INKP) due in September
body: This September, PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a paper and cardboard packaging manufacturer, is expected to pay two bond payments simultaneously. The Sinarmas Group subsidiary's Shelf Registration Bond IV Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Stage II 2023 Series A is scheduled to mature on September 5th, 2024, with a valuation of IDR207.05 billion. In addition, INKP will once again distribute IDR1.05 trillion to the investors of Shelf Registration Bond II Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Stage I 2021 Series B at the end of the month, specifically on September 30. This second payment will also be noted as this month's largest bond call payment.

title: JCI was sluggish throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen slipping throughout today’s (3/9) session, contrasting with yesterday’s (2/9) solid trend that brought JCI to the level of 7,700-ish.

title: BREN’s market cap surpasses BBCA, reaching IDR 1.43 quadrillion now
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) once again seized the top spot at market capitalisation list, defeating 934 other issuers in the stock exchange as of August 2024.

title: BCA Multi Finance now merges into BCA Finance
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) merges two of its subsidiaries, PT BCA Multi Finance (BMC) into PT BCA Finance, effective starting yesterday (1/9).

title: Elaine Low receives 22% shareholding in Bayan Resources (BYAN) from Low Tuck Kwong
body: Conglomerate and controller of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), Low Tuck Kwong, gave his daughter Elaine Low control over 7.33 billion BYAN shares on Wednesday, August 28. Securities firm BUT Butsche Bank AG facilitated the transaction between the two.

title: JCI was sluggish throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was seen slipping throughout today’s (3/9) session, contrasting with yesterday’s (2/9) solid trend that brought JCI to the level of 7,700-ish.

title: BREN’s market cap surpasses BBCA, reaching IDR 1.43 quadrillion now
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) once again seized the top spot at market capitalisation list, defeating 934 other issuers in the stock exchange as of August 2024.

title: BCA Multi Finance now merges into BCA Finance
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) merges two of its subsidiaries, PT BCA Multi Finance (BMC) into PT BCA Finance, effective starting yesterday (1/9).

title: Employee's wages in arrears, Indofarma to divest assets
body: PT Indofarma Tbk (INAF), a state-owned medicine and medical device manufacturer, is said to sell off its remaining assets to pay arrears to its own employees.

title: GRPM readies capex of IDR 20 billion to boost performance by 50%
body: PT Graha Prima Mentari Tbk (GRPM), the official distributor of Coca-Cola in Indonesia, allocates capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 20 billion this year.

title: PJAA scores dividend income of IDR 100 billion from subsidiary
body: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA) booked dividend income from one of its subsidiaries, PT Taman Impian Jaya Ancol (TIJA).

title: Bringing Financial Access Closer, Here’s a Success Story of Sunaie, BRILink Agent and UMi Partner
body: Starting from being a BRI loan customer, now Sunaie has successfully become a BRILink Agent and UMi partner who has helped many people around her escape from financial problems.

title: PALM eyes IDR 1.1 trillion in bond issuance
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM), an investment holding company, plans to issue Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase III Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1.1 trillion.

title: Official, OJK approved Bank Commonwealth’s merge into Bank OCBC NISP
body: PT Bank Commonwealth (BC) officially merges into PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP), effective after it obtains approval from the Board of Commissioners of Financial Services Authority (OJK) yesterday (1/9).

title: August 2024 saw inflation lowered to 2.12%
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) recorded inflation at 2.12% in August 2024, slowing down from 3.27% seen in August 2023.

title: Mayapada Hospital to inject subsidiary with IDR 50 billion worth of extra capital
body: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrajaya Tbk (SRAJ), the owner of Mayapada Hospital network, has granted additional capital of IDR 50 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Sejahtera Inti Sentosa (SIS).

title: Expanding business, ELPI to set up JV
body: PT Pelayaran Nasional Ekalya Purnamasari Tbk (ELPI), a marine transportation service provider, announces the establishment of its latest joint venture (JV).

title: MYOH saw revenue up 40.06%, yet profit down 34.76%
body: The revenue of PT Samindo Resources Tbk (MYOH) soared 40.06% in the first half (H1) of 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Morning session saw JCI soaring today
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) soared 7,701.39 right after the opening bell today (2/9).

title: Welcoming newly appointed CFO of GOTO, Simon Tak Leung Ho
body: Shareholders of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) appoint Simon Tak Leung Ho as the new Chief Financial Officers, replacing Wei Jye Jacky Lo.

title: ITMG to issue interim dividend of IDR 1,228 per share
body: PT Indo Tambang Raya Megah Tbk (ITMG), a coal mining company under the control of Banpu Minerals (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., is scheduling its interim dividend payment.

title: PDES to convert debt worth IDR 50 billion to stocks
body: PT Destinasi Tirta Nusantara Tbk (PDES), a tour and travel agent under Panorama Group, has swapped debts of one of its subsidiaries, PT Graha Destinasi, to equity.

title: Foreign share purchases surged, creating net surplus of 1.35 billion shares
body: Share purchase transactions by foreign investors on Friday, August 30, experienced a significant spike, with net foreign volume reaching 6.43 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was 5.07 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 1.35 billion shares. The acquisition of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares contributed to the growth in foreign net volume, as foreign investors purchased 2.84 million shares of this digital company, resulting in a net volume of 1.19 billion shares.

title: Net foreign volume surplus at 129.84 million shares as foreign buy rises
body: On Thursday, August 29, the foreign buying volume was 2.42 billion shares, which was higher than the foreign selling volume of roughly 2.29 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume totaled 129.84 million shares. The first place on the top buy list was the purchase of 224.89 million shares of PT Panin Financial Tbk (PNLF), a business and management consulting services provider, for a net volume of 168.47 million shares.

title: GRPM eyes revenue of IDR 560 billion in 2024
body: PT Graha Prima Mentari Tbk (GRPM) is targeting revenue and profit to reach IDR 560 billion and IDR 6 billion this year, higher than last year’s realisation.

title: WEGE seeks new contract target of IDR 5.1 T this year
body: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk (WEGE) is setting new contract target to IDR 5.1 trillion for 2024, relatively stagnant compared to new contract realisation per 2023, which also reached IDR 5.1 trillion.

title: Dominating domestic gold retail scene, HRTA targets 100 outlets this year
body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) is aiming for 15 new gold retail outlet his year to boost domination within the retail market in Indonesia. Until 2023, HRTA reported managing 85 stores across the country.

title: Komatsu heavy equipment sales plummeted, UNTR faced challenges from Chinese products
body: Sales of Komatsu heavy equipment recorded by PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) up to July (7M) 2024 were recorded at 2,515 units, down 29% compared to 7M 2023 which reached 3,551 units.

title: SMGR prepares IDR 2 trillion capex until year end
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) has allocated capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 2 trillion until the end of 2024. This budget is higher than the average regular capex in the previous year of around IDR 1.3 trillion.

title: Enhancing efficiency, HUMI to purchase 2 tugboats for IDR 22.5 billion
body: PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS) engaged in marine transportation sector, has reportedly acquired 2 units of tugboats.

title: One year after IPO, RSCH shares soared 169%
body: The share performance of PT Charlie Hospital Semarang Tbk (RSCH) shot up 169.5% a year after its debut on the capital market on August 28, 2023

title: Promising prospect, AKRA proceeds with Eastern Indonesia expansion
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) proceeds with its business expansion plan to Eastern Indonesia in order to promote business growth within the next few years.

title: Ending the week, JCI opened strong
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was gaining strides from the opening bell until 11.25 AM WIB today (30/8) to 7,661.28. This uptrend resembled the pattern seen at yesterday’s (29/8) opening.

title: Corporate credit performed well, BNI revises credit growth target to 12% in 2024
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) reported high performance of its credit disbursement until the first half (H1) of 2024, reaching IDR 727 trillion or up 11% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Official, BTPN is now SMBC Indonesia
body: Shareholders of PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) agreed upon the name change of the entity to PT Bank SMBC Indonesia Tbk.

title: AUTO to add 14 new Astra Otoservice outlets
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) will add 14 Astra Otoservice outlets in the second half of 2024, which are expected to optimise service and its automotive spare part sales to consumers of AUTO.

title: H1 2024, MIKA used up 37.8% of its 2024 capex
body: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk (MIKA) allocates capital expenditure (capex) budget of IDR 1 trillion this year, but the realisation until H1 2024 only reached 37.9%.

title: Gov’t to hold another SUN auction next week, eyeing IDR 22 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (3/9) with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.
